description:
Free software to recover deleted files

Active@ UNERASER recovers deleted files and folders on NTFS, FAT, exFAT, Linux Ext2/Ext3/Ext4/BtrFS, Apple HFS+, ApFS and Unix UFS file systems. It can even restore files from deleted and reformatted partitions.

- Added eBooks signatures recovery: MOBI, AZW, AZ3, AZ4, PRC, EPUB
- Improved recovery of properties for PDF, MP3 and other signatures
- Latest recovery Kernel 15.01.17 includes many improvements and bug fixes
- Included the latest Active@ Disk Editor 25 for low level disk data analysis
- The latest Linux Boot Disk based on openSUSE Leap 15.6
- Active@ Boot Disk upgraded to WinPE based on Windows 11 24H2 code base
